prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for pyridine (11 atoms: N + 5C + 5H) computed at the DFT level using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS, tier 'standard', exact four-center integrals — density fitting NOT used), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The N±1 states used charge ±1, multiplicity 2 (doublet). Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). Geometry: user-supplied pyridine.xyz, used as-is (no re-optimization). SCF converged for all three states (neutral, cation, anion). integrity.trustworthy = true.
